name: resurrector
description: A robust, lightweight process monitor and auto-restart tool for Windows. Built with Go and Wails/Svelte.

scripts.build:icons: shx cp logo.png ui/build/appicon.png && shx touch ui/build/appicon.png && shx rm -f ui/build/windows/icon.ico ui/build/windows/icon.syso ui/build/windows/rsrc_windows_amd64.syso && cd core && go run github.com/tc-hib/go-winres@latest simply --icon ../logo.png --file-version %npm_package_version% --product-version %npm_package_version% --product-name Resurrector --file-description "Resurrector Process Monitor" --copyright "Copyright (c) 2026 Daisuke (yet another) Maki"
scripts.build:core: pnpm run build:core-tray-icon && cd core && go build -ldflags="-H windowsgui -X main.Version=%npm_package_version%" -o ../build/resurrector.exe
scripts.build:ui: cd ui && wails build -ldflags "-X main.Version=%npm_package_version%" && cd .. && shx cp ui/build/bin/ui.exe build/resurrector-ui.exe
scripts.build: pnpm run prebuild && pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run build:ui && pnpm run build:core
scripts.clean: shx rm -rf build core/icon.ico core/*.syso ui/build/windows/*.ico ui/build/windows/*.syso ui/build/appicon.png
